title: 300Pcs Bamboo Skewers 9cm, Wooden Flat Paddle Burger Skewers, Bamboo Skebab Skewer for Cocktail Sticks, Kebab Sticks, Fruits, Buffet Party
features: 300pcs Wooden Skewer Sticks: Reusable and washable, perfect for bbq, fruit, cocktail, and party use, each 9cm flat stick ensures firm grip without slipping for easy grilling and serving
Flat Bamboo Skewers: Each 9cm long, ideal for your daily cooking, parties, and buffets. Paddle-shaped handle offers convenient turning during barbecues
Eco-Friendly Wood: Smooth, burr-free wooden sticks, polished for safe use in food, great for securing meats, fruits, sandwiches, and marshmallows, making them perfect for events and family gatherings

Cocktail Sticks Wooden: Flat design skewers prevent food sliding off while providing easy handling with a 1cm wide paddle handle, perfect for grilling, serving appetizers, and creative food presentations
Bamboo Skewers: Versatile natural wood skewers for bbqs, cocktail parties, desserts, sandwiches, and more. Eco-friendly, durable, and safe, these sticks enhance your grilling and catering experience
